name: THine Electronics, Inc.
summary: THine Electronics, Inc., a fabless semiconductor company, engages in the planning, designing, and sale of mixed-signal LSIs in Japan and internationally. It offers system modules, V-by-One HS products for flat panel displays that require higher frame rates and resolutions, V-by-One products for EMI and data transmission for long distance, transceivers, repeaters, low voltage differential signaling products, LED and motor drivers, image signal processors, timing controllers, video ADC products, power management ICs, and power modules. The company provides its products for use in cameras, USB cameras, LCD panels, projectors, multifunction printers, smartphones, and tablets, as well as medical, automotive, and gaming applications. THine Electronics, Inc. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
